case_title: ART KONRAD VS. SAN FRANCISCO ZOO & ZOOLOGICAL SOCIETY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KONRAD, ART
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KONRAD, ART AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO ZOO & ZOOLOGICAL SOCIETY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ART KONRAD APPEARED. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO ZOO & ZOOLOGICAL SOCIETY APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY ERIC KRUSSMAN, ASSISTANT CURATOR. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONRAD, ART IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO ZOO & ZOOLOGICAL SOCIETY THERE WAS NO EVIDENCE THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF; NOR DOES THE EVIDENCE SUPPORT THAT PLAITIFF'S INJURY RESULTED FROM A DANGEROUS CONDITION OF WHICH DEFENDANT WAS AWARE OR SHOULD HAVE KNOWN ABOUT BUT FAILED TO REPAIR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED MAY-19-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO ZOO & ZOOLOGICAL SOCIETY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO ZOO & ZOOLOGICAL SOCIETY
